positive: A stylized, symmetrical celestial constellation and botanical wreath design, featuring glowing nebula dust intertwined with hyper-detailed, geometric linework flowers and celestial bodies like crescent moons and stylized planets. The composition must be centered, clean, and scalable for print. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, ethereal gold, and matte teal. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau mixed with scientific illustration, resembling screen printing or engraved etching. Composition: Full circular wreath surrounding a focal point, highly detailed yet clean silhouette. Lighting: Soft, glowing light emanating from the central elements, minimal shadows. Print details: Vector quality, smooth lines, no gradient fade, solid color areas preferred.
negative: low quality, blurred, grainy, noise, watermark, text, signature, logo, complex background, busy composition, messy, dirty, bad anatomy, cropped, extra limbs, NSFW, photorealism, gradient fade, sketch, graffiti
